info.name: ZM AI Assistance — Full Test Suite
info.description:
Complete test coverage for ZM-AI-Assistance API (port 3002).

RUN ORDER:
1. Root & Health
2. Auth (Register sets {{authToken}} and {{registeredUsername}})
3. Auth / Register Alt User (sets {{altAuthToken}} for wrong-owner tests)
4. AI Chat
5. Chat Sessions (Create sets {{sessionId}})

All requests use {{baseUrl}} (default: http://localhost:3002).

item.name: ✅ Chat — Flea Market User Lookup Intent
✅ Create Session — Minimal (no body, sets sessionId)

exec: pm.expect(d.system_prompt).to.equal('Be very brief and use bullet points.');

item.name: ✅ Create Session — Full (title + system_prompt, sets deleteSessionId)

exec: pm.test('Returns both user and assistant messages', () => {

item.name: ❌ Send Message — Invalid UUID in Path (400)
✅ Update Session — Clear Title (set to null)
